title: Tuvo la culpa Adán
writer: Luisa-María Linares, Antonio Mas Guindal, Juan de Orduña
actors: Rafael Durán, Luchy Soto, María Esperanza Navarro
plot: Nora leaves the convent where she has been raised to marry a relative. Just arrived she has an accident resulting in total amnesia. Her identity mistaken a new life begins for her, where she will encounter love, adventure and even...
